question: How long do refunds take to process?
ground_truth: Refunds are issued to your original payment method within 5 to 7 business days after we receive the returned item.

question: How many days do I have to return an item?
ground_truth: You can return most items within 30 days of delivery, provided they are unused and in the original packaging.

question: Is shipping free?
ground_truth: Standard shipping is free on orders over $50. Orders under $50 have a flat $4.99 shipping fee.

question: How fast is express shipping and what does it cost?
ground_truth: Express shipping takes 1 to 2 business days and costs $12.99.

question: Do you ship internationally?
ground_truth: No. We currently ship only within the United States and Canada; international shipping is not available.

question: How do I reset my password?
ground_truth: Tap 'Forgot password?' on the login screen and enter your email. We send a reset link that is valid for 30 minutes.

question: How do I turn on two-factor authentication?
ground_truth: Go to Settings > Security > Two-factor authentication and follow the prompts; you can use an authenticator app or SMS codes.

question: My order was 8 days late with standard shipping. Can I get the shipping fee refunded?
ground_truth: Standard shipping fees are not refunded for carrier delays, though a goodwill store credit may be offered. If an order has not arrived within 10 business days, contact support to open a lost-package claim.

question: Which items cannot be returned?
ground_truth: Gift cards, downloadable software, and perishable goods cannot be returned.

question: How do I start a return?
ground_truth: Open the Orders tab in the app, select the order, and tap 'Return item'. You will receive a prepaid shipping label by email.

question: Do I have to pay to ship a return back?
ground_truth: You receive a prepaid shipping label for the return. Shipping costs are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error, such as a defective or wrong item.

question: Can I return an item I have already used?
ground_truth: No. To be eligible for a return the item must be unused and in the same condition you received it, in the original packaging.

question: What condition does an item need to be in to be returned?
ground_truth: It must be unused, in the same condition you received it, and in the original packaging.

question: How will I receive my refund?
ground_truth: Refunds are issued to your original payment method within 5 to 7 business days after we receive the returned item.

question: How long does standard shipping take?
ground_truth: Standard shipping takes 3 to 5 business days.

question: What is the shipping cost on a $40 order?
ground_truth: Orders under $50 have a flat shipping fee of $4.99.

question: Do I get free shipping on a $60 order?
ground_truth: Yes. Standard shipping is free on orders over $50.

question: How do I track my order?
ground_truth: You can track your order at any time from the Orders tab in the app. A tracking number is emailed to you as soon as your order ships.

question: When do I get my tracking number?
ground_truth: A tracking number is emailed to you as soon as your order ships.

question: Can you ship to the United Kingdom?
ground_truth: No. Shipping is only available within the United States and Canada; international shipping is not available.

question: What are the password requirements when creating an account?
ground_truth: Your password must be at least 8 characters.

question: How do I create an account?
ground_truth: Download the app, tap Sign up, enter your email address and create a password of at least 8 characters, then verify your email by tapping the link sent to you.

question: Can I use SMS for two-factor authentication?
ground_truth: Yes. You can use an authenticator app or receive codes by SMS.

question: What happens to my order history if I delete my account?
ground_truth: Deleting your account is permanent and removes your order history after 30 days.

question: Is deleting my account reversible?
ground_truth: No. Deleting your account is permanent.

question: My order has not arrived after 12 business days. What should I do?
ground_truth: If an order has not arrived within 10 business days, contact support to open a lost-package claim.

question: Why might my standard shipping be delayed?
ground_truth: Standard shipping estimates of 3 to 5 business days can occasionally be delayed by the carrier during peak periods.

question: I'm ordering something for $45. How much is shipping and how long will it take?
ground_truth: Orders under $50 have a flat $4.99 shipping fee, and standard shipping takes 3 to 5 business days.

question: Is two-factor authentication required?
ground_truth: Two-factor authentication is not required, but it is strongly recommended to keep your account secure.
